event_blocks.summary: The video begins with a title card in Chinese, 'Take you on a tour of my high school — What does an international high school with an annual tuition of 340,000 yuan look like?' by Claire, accompanied by calm, uplifting instrumental music. The scene shifts to an exterior view of a modern building marked by a blue street sign reading '昆承湖西路 88' (Kuncheng Lake West Road 88) and postal code 215500. The camera proceeds through a dimly lit corridor into a spacious, well-lit lobby featuring polished floors and large pillars, subsequently entering a contemporary atrium adorned with indoor greenery and modern furniture. Within the atrium, a café named 'United CAFÉ' is visible, showcasing pastries and beverages. Claire, a young woman with shoulder-length brown hair and pink highlights, dressed in a black t-shirt, starts speaking in Chinese, stating, "Now we've entered the school. This is Teaching Building 2, and inside there's a café, as well as history and science classrooms. Let's go to the café to buy a drink." She is then observed within the vibrant café space, holding a smartphone and scanning a QR code for payment. Claire proceeds to order in Chinese, "Lychee sparkling water, thank you," which is followed by distinct electronic beeps and chimes signifying a successful transaction.

Atrium Space.description: An open, multi-level atrium with modern furniture, indoor plants climbing columns, and a mix of natural and artificial lighting, creating a bright and airy atmosphere.

United CAFÉ.description: A modern café with a white sign bearing the name 'United CAFÉ' in elegant script, featuring a glass display case filled with pastries, cakes, and beverages, and shelves stocked with snacks and drinks. It is identified by Claire as a place to buy drinks, and where she orders a 'Lychee sparkling water'.

Street Sign.description: A blue rectangular street sign with white text reading '昆承湖西路 88' and postal code '215500', mounted on a concrete wall.

Claire.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair featuring pink highlights, wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic print, holding a smartphone and scanning a QR code. She speaks fluent Chinese with a clear, friendly voice, describing the school's interior (Teaching Building 2, café, history and science classrooms) and ordering a 'Lychee sparkling water'.

Lobby Interior.description: A spacious, polished lobby with large pillars, reflective flooring, arched alcoves with potted plants, and glass doors leading to an outdoor area.

raw_segments: The video opens with a title card in Chinese, translating to 'Take you on a tour of my high school — What does an international high school with an annual tuition of 340,000 yuan look like?' by Claire, set to a calm, uplifting instrumental background music. The scene transitions to an exterior shot of a modern building with a blue street sign reading '昆承湖西路 88' (Kuncheng Lake West Road 88) and postal code 215500. The camera then moves through a dimly lit corridor into a spacious, well-lit lobby with polished floors and large pillars, before entering a contemporary atrium with indoor greenery and modern furniture. Here, a café named 'United CAFÉ' is visible, displaying pastries and beverages. A young woman, Claire, with shoulder-length brown hair and pink highlights, wearing a black t-shirt, begins speaking in Chinese, explaining, "Now we've entered the school. This is Teaching Building 2, and inside there's a café, as well as history and science classrooms. Let's go to the café to buy a drink." She is then seen holding a smartphone and scanning a QR code, likely for payment, within the vibrant café space. Claire then orders in Chinese, "Lychee sparkling water, thank you," followed by distinct electronic beeps and chimes indicating a successful transaction.

event_blocks.summary: Claire, a young woman with shoulder-length brown hair and pink highlights, wearing a graphic black t-shirt, holds a smartphone and scans a QR code while listing food items in Chinese, including "many cakes" and "instant noodles," and announces she has received her "No. 7 water." The scene transitions outdoors with light, upbeat background music as Claire identifies "Building Two" and a "place for children to play." The camera then pans to a wide view of a modern campus athletic complex, which Claire describes as a "soccer field" she rarely uses, preferring the gym for running. The camera moves along the red running track surrounding the green artificial turf field, capturing contemporary buildings with large windows and geometric designs. Claire points out numerous national flags flying along the perimeter fence, explaining they likely represent the diverse nationalities of teachers and students from her high school, which had attendees from over 100 countries. Under a clear blue sky, the camera highlights lane markings, a sandpit for long jump, and a chain-link fence, before ending with a view through the fence toward a landscaped pathway and trees in the quiet, people-free environment.

Claire.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair featuring pink highlights, wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic print, holding a smartphone and scanning a QR code. She is the narrator, speaking in a female Chinese voice, sharing personal observations about the campus and her high school experience.

Athletic Field.description: A large outdoor sports complex featuring a red running track with white lane markings, a green artificial turf field with soccer goals, a sandpit for long jump, and a chain-link fence bordering the area, surrounded by modern buildings with flags and trees under a clear blue sky. The narrator identifies it as a 'soccer field' and explains that the numerous national flags along its perimeter represent the diverse nationalities of students and teachers from her high school.

raw_segments: The video begins with a close-up of Claire, a young woman with shoulder-length brown hair featuring pink highlights, wearing a graphic black t-shirt, holding a smartphone, and scanning a QR code. Her voice, speaking Chinese, is heard listing food items like "many cakes" and "instant noodles," then stating she has received her "No. 7 water." The camera quickly pans away from Claire, transitioning to an outdoor setting. As a light, upbeat background music begins, Claire's voice continues, identifying a "Building Two" and a "place for children to play" before the scene shifts to a wide view of a modern campus athletic complex. She describes it as a "soccer field," noting she hasn't used it much because she prefers the gym for running. The camera smoothly moves along the red running track surrounding the green artificial turf field with soccer goals, capturing various angles of the contemporary buildings with large windows and geometric designs. Claire's voice points out the numerous national flags flying along the perimeter, explaining that they circle the entire soccer field's fence. She elaborates that these flags likely represent the diverse nationalities of teachers and students from her high school, which had people from over 100 countries. The clear blue sky emphasizes the spaciousness and orderliness of the quiet, people-free environment, as the camera highlights lane markings, a sandpit for long jump, and a chain-link fence before ending with a view through the fence toward a landscaped pathway and trees.

event_blocks.summary: The narrative begins with a rapid camera transition from an outdoor covered walkway into a modern, glass-enclosed lobby, accompanied by a female Mandarin announcement, "Let's go to the sports center," as a 'Sports Centre' sign is passed, and upbeat electronic music commences. The camera glides into a multi-level atrium, revealing a fitness area with treadmills and elliptical machines on the lower level, while the speaker explains the sports center's three floors, noting the first floor's swimming pool is closed and the second floor is their usual destination. Passing a 'Silence Please' sign and an 'Examination in Progress' sign on a glass door, the speaker whispers about the upstairs basketball court being closed for an exam. The journey continues through polished hallways, past a water dispenser and another 'Examination in Progress' door, leading to a spacious gym area with red-accented walls, weight machines, and free weights under bright lighting, where the speaker concludes, "This is also where I prefer..." The scene then shifts to the interior of this spacious gym, identified as the 'strength room,' featuring red-accented walls, various weight machines, free weights, and treadmills under bright lighting, with the speaker highlighting equipment, a large rack, and their favorite 'boxing sandbag,' while noting the removal of two original items. Exiting the building, the camera moves into a well-maintained outdoor campus environment under a bright, sunny sky, with paved walkways lined by lush trees and shrubs. The camera pans across a central courtyard featuring a stone sculpture surrounded by red flowers, continuing along a curved path bordered by orange marigolds and manicured lawns, with modern multi-story buildings with glass windows and gray roofs in the background, one of which houses drama and music classrooms and a theater. Further ahead, a large lawn is identified as the 'Grass Circle,' a popular circular grassy area, as upbeat electronic music with a 'Hey, hey, hey' vocal sample plays throughout the outdoor segment, creating a calm and serene atmosphere with no people visible.

Sports Centre.description: A sign on a concrete wall reading 'Sports Centre' in English and '体育中心' in Chinese, indicating the building's function as a fitness and recreational facility. A female voice confirms the destination, stating the center has three floors, with the first floor being a currently closed swimming pool and the second floor being her usual destination.

Lobby Interior.description: A spacious, polished lobby with large pillars, reflective flooring, arched alcoves with potted plants, and glass doors leading to an outdoor area, now shown with a modern atrium design featuring glass railings and multi-level access.

Examination Sign.description: A white sign on a glass door reading 'Examination in Progress' and '考试进行中请保持安静' (Examination in Progress, Please Keep Quiet), indicating a quiet academic zone within the building. A female voice explains that the basketball court upstairs is holding an exam, necessitating quiet, which she demonstrates by speaking in a hushed tone.

Atrium Space.description: An open, multi-level atrium with modern furniture, indoor plants climbing columns, and a mix of natural and artificial lighting, creating a bright and airy atmosphere, now clearly visible with fitness equipment on the lower level and glass railings on upper levels.

Fitness Gym Area.description: A spacious indoor gym with red-accented walls, various weight machines, free weights, and treadmills, located on the lower level of the building, under bright, even lighting, identified by the speaker as the 'strength room' containing equipment, a large rack, and a 'boxing sandbag,' with a note that two of an original three items (possibly racks) have been removed.

Water Dispenser.description: A stainless steel water dispenser located in a hallway, with a blue instructional sign nearby, suggesting a utility area for building occupants.

Modern Campus Buildings.description: Multi-story buildings with large glass windows, gray roofs, and modern architectural design, situated around the landscaped courtyard and walkways, with one adjacent building specifically noted by the speaker to contain drama classrooms, music classrooms, and a theater.

Campus Courtyard.description: A central outdoor courtyard featuring a stone sculpture surrounded by red flowers, bordered by paved walkways, green lawns, and orange marigolds, with modern buildings in the background under a clear blue sky. A large lawn within this area is specifically named the 'Grass Circle' by the speaker, described as a big circular grassy area popular on good weather days or weekends.

raw_segments: The video opens with a rapid, blurred camera movement, transitioning from an outdoor covered walkway into a modern, glass-enclosed lobby. A female voice announces in Mandarin, "Let's go to the sports center," as the camera passes a 'Sports Centre' sign in both English and Chinese. Upbeat electronic music begins, setting an energetic tone. The camera glides into a multi-level atrium, revealing a fitness area with treadmills and elliptical machines on the lower level. The speaker explains that "The sports center has three floors in total. The first floor is the swimming pool, which isn't open yet. The second floor is where I usually go." As the camera passes a 'Silence Please' sign and another indicating 'Examination in Progress' on a glass door, the speaker whispers, "Currently, the basketball court upstairs is having an exam, so this area is closed, and I can only speak quietly." The journey continues through polished hallways, past a water dispenser, and another 'Examination in Progress' door, leading to a spacious gym area with red-accented walls, weight machines, and free weights under bright lighting. The upbeat music with vocalizations continues, and the speaker concludes, "This is also where I prefer...", implying the gym is a favored spot, reinforcing the clean, quiet, and institutional atmosphere where fitness and academic functions coexist.

The video opens inside a spacious indoor gym, identified by a speaker as the 'strength room,' featuring red-accented walls, various weight machines, free weights, and treadmills under bright, even lighting. The speaker highlights the presence of equipment, a large rack, and their favorite 'boxing sandbag,' also noting that two of an original three items (possibly racks) have been removed. The camera moves through this clean, organized space with minimal activity before exiting the building into a well-maintained campus environment. Outdoors, under a bright, sunny sky, paved walkways are lined with lush green trees and shrubs. The camera pans across a central courtyard with a stone sculpture surrounded by vibrant red flowers, continuing along a curved path bordered by orange marigolds and manicured lawns. In the background, modern multi-story buildings with large glass windows and gray roofs are visible, with one adjacent building specifically mentioned by the speaker as housing drama classrooms, music classrooms, and a theater. Further ahead, a large lawn is named the 'Grass Circle' by the speaker, described as a big circular grassy area popular on good weather days or weekends. The atmosphere is calm and serene, with no people in sight, while an upbeat electronic background music with a 'Hey, hey, hey' vocal sample plays throughout the outdoor segment.

event_blocks.summary: The video begins with a panoramic view of a modern campus courtyard, characterized by lush green lawns, meticulously maintained hedges, and bright orange marigolds, set against a backdrop of multi-story buildings with expansive glass windows and gray roofs. A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair and pink highlights walks along a paved path, addressing the camera in Mandarin and describing the courtyard as a versatile space for relaxation and reading, recalling its spring beauty with cherry blossoms and its current state adorned with diverse flowers and plants. She elaborates on the surrounding architecture, identifying the first floor of the central building as the cafeteria, the second and third floors as the library, and the adjacent buildings as classrooms, highlighting sunset as the most picturesque time, best viewed from a shorter central building named 'Baijia Tan.' A sign reading '请爱护花草' (Please take care of flowers and grass) is visible amidst the landscaped grounds. Concluding her description with an invitation to explore the cafeteria, the scene shifts indoors to a vibrant, well-lit cafeteria or buffet area, distinguished by international flags suspended from the ceiling, a 'SOCIAL KITCHEN' sign, wooden shelving, food counters, and the presence of several individuals, contributing to a dynamic and inviting ambiance.

Campus Courtyard.description: A central outdoor courtyard featuring expansive green lawns, paved walkways, orange marigolds, and modern buildings under a clear blue sky, with a sign reading '请爱护花草' (Please take care of flowers and grass). The young woman describes it as a place for relaxation, chatting, or reading, noting that it was beautiful with cherry blossom trees in spring and now features many different colored flowers and plants.

Modern Campus Buildings.description: Multi-story buildings with large glass windows, gray roofs, and modern architectural design, featuring decorative roof elements and geometric patterns on facades, situated around the landscaped courtyard. The young woman specifies that the central large building's first floor is a cafeteria, the second and third floors are a library, and the side buildings are classrooms. She also names a shorter central building as 'Baijia Tan,' from which the sunset is particularly beautiful.

NewEntityName.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair featuring pink highlights, wearing a black top, holding a clear plastic cup with a white lid and straw, speaking directly to the camera in clear Mandarin, providing a guided tour and description of the campus features.

raw_segments: The video opens with a sweeping view of a modern campus courtyard, showcasing expansive green lawns bordered by neatly trimmed hedges and vibrant orange marigolds, with multi-story buildings featuring large glass windows and gray roofs in the background. A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair and pink highlights appears, walking along a paved path while speaking directly to the camera in clear Mandarin. She describes the courtyard as a place where one can bring a blanket to lie down, chat, or read, noting that in spring it was beautiful with many cherry blossom trees and now features various different colored flowers and plants. She further details the surrounding modern campus buildings, explaining that the first floor of the large central building houses the cafeteria, the second and third floors are the library, and the buildings on both sides are classrooms. She adds that the most beautiful time is at sunset, visible from a shorter central building she calls 'Baijia Tan.' As she speaks, the camera captures more of the landscaped grounds, including a sign with Chinese characters reading '请爱护花草' (Please take care of flowers and grass). With a suggestion to "Let's go check out the cafeteria!", the scene transitions indoors to a brightly lit cafeteria or buffet area, where colorful international flags hang from the ceiling, and a 'SOCIAL KITCHEN' sign is visible, featuring wooden shelving, food counters, and a few people moving about, creating a lively and welcoming atmosphere.

event_blocks.summary: Inside a bustling cafeteria, the United CAFÉ, with its high ceiling, geometric panels, skylights, and international flags, an upbeat pop track with female vocals begins as the camera pans across food counters labeled 'Influences' and 'United CAFÉ', revealing staff in a modern dining area while the singer states, "I've been painting every fence I know, every color pleasing to the eye." The scene shifts as the camera ascends a concrete staircase with metal railings, passing a green emergency exit sign, to an upper level where a large window offers a view of a landscaped Campus Courtyard featuring Modern Campus Buildings and greenery under a clear blue sky, accompanied by the lyric, "Yeah, you better know where you're going." The camera then traverses a spacious, curved hallway with polished floors, glass railings, and sparse furniture, including a red chair and a small round table, before entering a bright, open Library Reading Area. This space is characterized by circular wooden bookshelves, a patterned rug, and abundant natural light from large windows, with a central display table showcasing books like 'The Hate U Give' and 'I'd Rather Be Reading', as the music continues with "You're a wanderer just like me," transitioning the narrative from a lively communal dining area to a quiet, contemplative academic environment that highlights the building’s multi-functional design and its connection to the outdoors.

Atrium Space.description: An open, multi-level atrium with modern furniture, indoor plants climbing columns, and a mix of natural and artificial lighting, creating a bright and airy atmosphere, now clearly visible with glass railings on upper levels and a view of the campus courtyard.

United CAFÉ.description: A modern café with a white sign bearing the name 'United CAFÉ' in elegant script, featuring a glass display case filled with pastries, cakes, and beverages, and shelves stocked with snacks and drinks, visible in the initial food court area.

Modern Campus Buildings.description: Multi-story buildings with large glass windows, gray roofs, and modern architectural design, featuring decorative roof elements and geometric patterns on facades, situated around the landscaped courtyard, visible through the window and in the background of the courtyard view.

Campus Courtyard.description: A central outdoor courtyard featuring expansive green lawns, paved walkways, orange marigolds, and modern buildings in the background under a clear blue sky, with a sign reading '请爱护花草' (Please take care of flowers and grass), visible through the large window on the upper level.

Library Reading Area.description: A bright, open library or reading space with wooden bookshelves arranged in a circular layout, a patterned rug, and natural light streaming through large windows, featuring a central display table with books such as 'The Hate U Give' and 'I'd Rather Be Reading'.

Lobby Interior.description: A spacious, polished lobby with large pillars, reflective flooring, arched alcoves with potted plants, and glass doors leading to an outdoor area, now shown with a modern atrium design featuring glass railings and multi-level access, visible during the transition up the stairs and into the upper hallway.

Examination Sign.description: A white sign on a glass door reading 'Examination in Progress' and '考试进行中请保持安静' (Examination in Progress, Please Keep Quiet), indicating a quiet academic zone within the building, visible briefly in the hallway before entering the library space.

raw_segments: The video opens inside a bustling cafeteria or food court, characterized by a high ceiling with geometric panels, skylights, and colorful international flags, all set to an upbeat, pop-like track featuring electronic elements and female vocals. The camera pans across food counters labeled 'Influences' and 'United CAFÉ', showcasing a modern, open dining area with glass display cases and staff, as the singer begins, "I've been painting every fence I know, every color pleasing to the eye." The scene transitions as the camera moves up a concrete staircase with metal railings, passing a green emergency exit sign, leading to an upper level. Upon reaching the top, the camera reveals a large window overlooking a landscaped campus courtyard with modern buildings and greenery under a clear blue sky, while the vocals continue, "Yeah, you better know where you're going." The camera then moves through a spacious, curved hallway with polished floors, glass railings, and minimal furniture, including a red chair and a small round table. The journey continues into a bright, open library or reading space with wooden bookshelves arranged in a circular layout, a patterned rug, and natural light streaming through large windows. A display table in the center features books like 'The Hate U Give' and 'I'd Rather Be Reading', suggesting a focus on literature and learning, as the music plays on with lyrics like "You're a wanderer just like me," shifting the atmosphere from a lively communal dining space to a quiet, contemplative academic environment, emphasizing the building’s multi-functional design and connection to the outdoors.

event_blocks.summary: The video begins with a close-up of a vibrant book display in the Library Reading Area, showcasing titles like 'The Hate U Give' and 'I'd Rather Be Reading' under a 'READING' banner, illuminated by natural light and surrounded by circular wooden bookshelves, accompanied by upbeat electronic pop music with female vocals. A pan right reveals an outdoor vista from a balcony, overlooking the Campus Courtyard with its calm water, traditional Chinese-style buildings, a white arched bridge, and modern high-rise structures under a blue sky. The scene transitions indoors to a well-lit hallway within the Lobby Interior, characterized by green wainscoting, wooden flooring, and hanging Calligraphy Artworks, with a sign prompting 'LET'S TALK ABOUT... UWC MATTERS...'. A female voice announces in Chinese, "这边是中文系的教室" (This side is the Chinese Department's classroom), as the camera progresses down the corridor, passing doors with decorative windows and Bulletin Boards featuring student work with Chinese characters. The speaker continues, "我的中文教室在1楼，现在去看一下可不可以，看一眼教室里面有什么" (My Chinese classroom is on the 1st floor, let's go take a look now, see what's inside the classroom). The hallway, illuminated by recessed lights and leading towards a bright exit, concludes with a focus on a Decorative Door with a Chinese window adorned with red paper bearing a '福' (fortune) character, marking the entrance to the Chinese classroom, while the electronic pop music persists.

Calligraphy Artwork.description: Framed vertical calligraphy pieces in black ink on white paper, mounted on the walls of the hallway, adding a cultural and artistic element to the space.

Library Reading Area.description: A bright, open library or reading space with wooden bookshelves arranged in a circular layout, a patterned rug, and natural light streaming through large windows, featuring a central display table with books such as 'The Hate U Give' and 'I'd Rather Be Reading'.

Lobby Interior.description: A spacious, polished lobby with large pillars, reflective flooring, arched alcoves with potted plants, and glass doors leading to an outdoor area, now shown with a modern atrium design featuring glass railings and multi-level access, visible during the transition up the stairs and into the upper hallway.

Decorative Door with Chinese Window.description: A wooden door with a traditional Chinese-style arched window, adorned with red decorative paper featuring a '福' (fortune) character, suggesting cultural or festive significance, which a female speaker indicates is the entrance to her 'Chinese classroom'.

Bulletin Board with Student Work.description: A corkboard displaying various papers, including handwritten notes and artwork, some with Chinese characters, indicating student engagement and creative expression.

Modern Campus Buildings.description: Multi-story buildings with large glass windows, gray roofs, and modern architectural design, featuring decorative roof elements and geometric patterns on facades, situated around the landscaped courtyard, visible through the window and in the background of the courtyard view.

Campus Courtyard.description: A central outdoor courtyard featuring expansive green lawns, paved walkways, orange marigolds, and modern buildings in the background under a clear blue sky, with a sign reading '请爱护花草' (Please take care of flowers and grass), visible through the large window on the upper level.

Hallway with Green Wainscoting.description: A long, well-lit indoor hallway with green wainscoting, wooden flooring, and white upper walls, featuring doors with decorative windows, bulletin boards with student work, and recessed ceiling lights, creating a clean and academic atmosphere, identified by a female speaker as leading to the 'Chinese Department's classroom' and her 'Chinese classroom on the 1st floor'.

raw_segments: The video opens with a close-up of a vibrant book display in the Library Reading Area, featuring colorful books like 'The Hate U Give' and 'I'd Rather Be Reading' under a 'READING' banner, all within a bright space with circular wooden bookshelves and natural light, set to upbeat electronic pop music with female vocals. A quick pan right transitions to an outdoor view from a balcony overlooking a serene campus landscape, revealing a calm body of water, traditional Chinese-style buildings with curved roofs, and a white arched bridge, set against modern high-rise buildings under a clear blue sky, encompassing the tranquil Campus Courtyard with its green lawns and paved walkways. The scene then shifts indoors to a well-lit hallway with green wainscoting and wooden flooring, part of the Lobby Interior, where framed Calligraphy Artworks hang and a sign reads 'LET'S TALK ABOUT... UWC MATTERS...'. A female voice begins speaking in Chinese, stating, "这边是中文系的教室" (This side is the Chinese Department's classroom). As the camera moves steadily down the clean, quiet corridor, passing doors with decorative windows and Bulletin Boards displaying student work, including Chinese characters, the speaker continues, "我的中文教室在1楼，现在去看一下可不可以，看一眼教室里面有什么" (My Chinese classroom is on the 1st floor, let's go take a look now, see what's inside the classroom). The hallway, lit by recessed lights and leading toward a bright exit, culminates in a focus on a Decorative Door with a traditional Chinese-style window adorned with red paper featuring a '福' (fortune) character, clearly indicating the entrance to the speaker's "Chinese classroom." The electronic pop music continues throughout.

event_blocks.summary: The video begins inside a culturally decorated space featuring a wooden door with a Chinese-style window, red decorative paper with the character '福', a blue '拉' sign, and a police contact notice, accompanied by soft, melodic traditional Chinese music and a female voice singing "老师在教室里." A click sound transitions the scene to a bright, sunny outdoor setting with modern campus buildings partially obscured by trees. Upbeat acoustic guitar music accompanies the camera as it moves along a stone-paved pathway through a landscaped park with young trees, leading to a tranquil lakeside park reflecting the blue sky. Across the water, modern buildings with traditional Chinese architectural elements are visible. The camera pans across a stone bridge with ornate railings leading to a pavilion, then shifts to a higher vantage point revealing a landscaped courtyard with pavilions, lawns, and flowerbeds. A young woman with pink highlights states, "叫鱼山书院是..." The camera sweeps across a newly opened, traditional Chinese-style courtyard, described as "really beautiful, like a garden," with a stone path, covered pavilion, and a circular stone mosaic design. The speaker recalls martial arts and an oral Chinese exam in this "small courtyard." The scene transitions to a walkway leading to a water feature, then along a lakeside path with views of modern buildings, including "the library building," "classrooms and dormitories." A modern white building with traditional elements is shown, accompanied by upbeat instrumental music. The camera reveals a water feature with a dock and sailboats. A female voice explains, "this side is a dock" and notes that students sail there. The scene transitions to stone steps and a tiered seating area, then to a pathway leading to the "teachers' dormitory building," which she describes as "very, very beautiful," clarifying that "further past that is the students', which is my dormitory!" The video then ascends wide stone stairs into a sunlit courtyard surrounded by modern buildings, identified as the 'Dormitory Building' with female students on the left, male students on the right, and shared common spaces in the center. Inside, a bright 'Common Room' features colorful columns, blue sofas, and a 'Signature Wall' dating back to 2015. The video concludes in a landscaped courtyard with white flowers, green shrubs, and a butterfly.

Modern Campus Buildings.description: Multi-story buildings with white walls and dark tiled roofs featuring traditional upturned eaves, situated around a landscaped courtyard and visible across a calm body of water, blending classical Chinese architecture with modern design elements.

Lakeside Park Pathway.description: A paved pathway winding along a calm water feature, bordered by white stone railings, young trees supported by wooden stakes, and lampposts. It leads toward a small bridge and traditional-style buildings across the water, and the speaker indicates that the stone steps leading upward from this path go to the dorms, noting it's an unusual route they're taking after visiting the teachers' dorms.

Decorative Door with Chinese Window.description: A wooden door with a traditional Chinese-style arched window, adorned with red decorative paper featuring the '福' (fortune) character, a blue '拉' (pull) sign, and a police contact notice, is seen as soft, melodic traditional Chinese music plays, featuring a female voice singing in Mandarin, '老师在教室里' (The teacher is in the classroom), suggesting a culturally decorated classroom or educational space.

NewEntityName.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair featuring pink highlights, wearing a black top, holding a clear plastic cup with a white lid and straw, speaking to the camera while walking along a paved path.

Traditional Chinese Pavilion.description: A covered structure with dark wooden pillars, a tiled roof with upturned eaves, and open sides, serving as a shaded walkway or rest area within the courtyard, featuring decorative lattice work and a wooden sign with Chinese characters above the entrance.

Decorative Wall Openings.description: Vase-shaped cutouts in the white courtyard walls, framed with stone, allowing views of greenery and pathways beyond, adding aesthetic and functional design elements to the space.

Campus Courtyard.description: A central courtyard with white walls, decorative wall openings shaped like vases, stone benches, and a circular mosaic design on the ground, surrounded by traditional pavilions and greenery, under bright sunlight.

Stone Mosaic Design.description: A circular pattern embedded in the courtyard pavement, composed of dark and light stones forming a dragon or floral motif, serving as a decorative focal point in the central open space.

Atrium Space.description: An open, multi-level atrium with modern furniture, indoor plants climbing columns, and a mix of natural and artificial lighting, creating a bright and airy atmosphere, now clearly visible with glass railings on upper levels and a view of the campus courtyard.

Dormitory Building.description: A modern multi-story building with a geometric facade of white and gray panels, featuring a central atrium with glass balconies and a large 'A' emblem, housing separate male and female dorms with a shared common space in the center. A female voice narrates in Chinese that there are three such dormitory buildings in the school, for students.

Common Room.description: A bright, open indoor space with colorful painted columns, blue sofas, a large window, and a wall covered in signatures and messages from past residents, serving as a communal area for students.

Signature Wall.description: A white wall covered in handwritten names, messages, and drawings from residents since 2015, including a colorful 'ANANA' sign and a pineapple illustration, serving as a historical record of the dorm community.

raw_segments: The video opens with a close-up of a wooden door featuring a traditional Chinese-style arched window, adorned with red decorative paper bearing the character '福' (fortune), a blue '拉' (pull) sign, and a police contact notice. This culturally decorated interior space is accompanied by soft, melodic traditional Chinese music, with a female voice gently singing in Mandarin, specifically the line "老师在教室里" (The teacher is in the classroom). A subtle click sound is heard as the scene transitions to an outdoor setting, revealing a bright, sunny day with a wide view of modern campus buildings partially obscured by lush green trees and shrubs. The music then shifts to an upbeat acoustic guitar melody as the camera moves along a paved pathway winding through a landscaped park, lined with young trees supported by wooden stakes, leading toward a calm body of water. The acoustic guitar continues to play, enhancing the serene lakeside view with reeds and distant city skyscrapers visible across the water, suggesting an urban park environment. The path curves along the water’s edge, bordered by metal railings and lampposts, with modern buildings and traditional-style rooftops in the background. The camera pans across the tranquil scene, highlighting the contrast between natural greenery and urban architecture, before moving along a shaded walkway lined with young trees, emphasizing the peaceful, well-maintained park atmosphere under clear blue skies, all set to the continuous gentle acoustic guitar music.

The minute opens with a close-up view of a stone-paved pathway, winding through a grassy area flanked by young trees supported by wooden stakes, leading towards a calm body of water. A gentle, melodic instrumental piece, featuring a plucked string instrument (possibly a guzheng) and soft, rhythmic percussion, begins to play, setting a serene and contemplative mood. As the camera moves forward, it reveals a tranquil lakeside park with lush greenery and a water surface reflecting the bright blue sky. Across the water, modern buildings with traditional Chinese architectural elements—such as curved tiled roofs and gray facades—are visible, blending contemporary design with cultural aesthetics. The camera pans across the lake, showcasing a stone bridge with ornate railings and carved balusters, leading to a small pavilion with a classic upturned roof. The perspective then shifts to a higher vantage point from the bridge, revealing a landscaped courtyard adorned with traditional-style pavilions, manicured lawns, and vibrant flowerbeds. A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair featuring pink highlights, wearing a black top, appears briefly, holding a clear plastic cup. She smiles and speaks directly to the camera, her clear and informative voice stating, '叫鱼山书院是...' (called Yushan Academy is...), her words layered over the continuing gentle music. The scene concludes with the camera panning further across the water, revealing more of the lakeside architecture and a distant city skyline, emphasizing the peaceful coexistence of nature, traditional design, and urban development under bright, natural sunlight.

The video opens with a sweeping view of a newly opened, traditional Chinese-style courtyard, which the speaker describes as "really beautiful, like a garden." The camera moves along a stone path bordered by grass and ornamental rocks, passing under a covered pavilion with wooden pillars and intricate roof details. The speaker recalls performing martial arts and taking an oral Chinese exam in this "small courtyard," which features a circular stone mosaic design on the ground, flanked by benches and decorative vase-shaped wall openings. The scene transitions from a building entrance with a wooden sign to a paved walkway leading toward a tranquil water feature, where a hand briefly points toward a small bridge and surrounding structures. The camera continues along a lakeside path, bordered by white stone railings and young trees, capturing views of modern buildings with traditional architectural elements across the water. The speaker identifies one of these as "the library building" and notes that others are "classrooms and dormitories." The bright, sunny environment with clear blue skies, accompanied by traditional Chinese instrumental music, highlights the serene and well-maintained blend of classical Chinese design with modern landscaping.

The video opens with a modern, white building featuring traditional Chinese architectural elements like upturned eaves and decorative wall patterns, set within a landscaped area of young trees and shrubs. An upbeat, light instrumental background music, featuring a cheerful melody and simple drum beat, accompanies the scene. The camera pans right to reveal a calm water feature with a small dock and several sailboats moored, backed by distant city buildings under a clear blue sky. A female voice explains that "this side is a dock" with "some sailboats," noting that "people from our school who participate in sailing activities will go there when the weather is good" to "sail the boats out," though she admits she doesn't "know much about it." The scene then transitions to a closer view of the water, showing stone steps leading down and a curved, tiered seating area. The camera moves along a paved pathway bordered by greenery and lampposts, passing a person walking in the distance. The female speaker remarks, "I think the teachers' living quarters here are also very, very beautiful," as the camera continues upward along a series of wide, stone steps flanked by white walls, leading toward a higher level of the complex. She further clarifies, "this building here is also the teachers' dormitory," adding that "further past that is the students', which is my dormitory!" She then points out, "Going up from here are the dorms," acknowledging that "actually, usually no one walks this way," but they are because they "just came back from the teachers' dormitory building," and "looking from here is also quite nice." The architecture consistently blends clean lines, white walls, and dark accents with traditional motifs, all bathed in bright, sunny natural light, creating a serene and well-maintained atmosphere.

The video opens with a low-angle shot ascending wide stone stairs, leading into a sunlit courtyard surrounded by modern, multi-story buildings featuring a distinctive geometric facade of white and gray panels. As a French song with a female vocalist, acoustic guitar, and light percussion begins to play, the camera pans upward, revealing the full height of the 'Dormitory Building' with its central atrium, glass-enclosed balconies, and a large decorative 'A' emblem on the facade. On-screen text identifies the structure as a dormitory, further explaining that the left side houses female students, the right side male students, and the center contains shared common spaces. A female voice narrates in Chinese, stating, 'There are three dormitory buildings in the school, for students.' The scene then moves inside through a glass door into a bright, open 'Common Room' adorned with colorful painted columns, blue sofas, and a 'Signature Wall' covered in messages and signatures from past residents dating from 2015 to the present. The segment concludes by transitioning back outside to a peaceful, landscaped courtyard, vibrant with blooming white flowers and green shrubs, where a butterfly flutters under a clear blue sky.

event_blocks.summary: The video begins with a sweeping panoramic view of a serene campus landscape featuring a water body, trees, and modern buildings under a clear blue sky, accompanied by upbeat French pop music. The camera pans right to reveal a multi-story dormitory building with a geometric facade and a central atrium, identified by a text overlay as 'A4: IKHAYA - House of Pineapples,' with Chinese subtitles translating to 'The house I lived in for three years, IKHAYA.' The scene transitions inside to a hallway with purple wainscoting and wooden doors, then enters a dorm room. Inside, a neatly arranged but lived-in space contains a bed, desk, shelves, and personal items. A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair, pink highlights, wearing a black t-shirt, and holding a phone is reflected in a mirror. She speaks in Chinese, stating, "This is my dorm room, it's a bit messy because I'm graduating and packing things." The camera pans to the window, showing adjacent buildings and a circular architectural feature. Near the window, luggage, yoga mats, a foam roller, and a small heater are visible. The woman identifies these items in Chinese as "my suitcases, yoga mat for exercise, foam roller, and the winter savior for northerners in the south, the electric heater," signaling preparations for departure. A hand reappears, pointing to the circular feature seen through the window, connecting the interior view to the exterior architecture as the French pop song continues.

IKHAYA Dorm Room.description: A personal dorm room with wooden furniture, purple wainscoting, a bed with patterned bedding, a desk with a lamp and personal items, shelves filled with boxes and books, and a mirror reflecting the occupant. The room contains luggage, yoga mats, a foam roller, and a small electric heater near the window, indicating a lived-in space with signs of departure, which the occupant explicitly states is messy due to her graduation and packing.

Dormitory Building.description: A modern multi-story building with a geometric facade of white and gray panels, featuring a central atrium with glass balconies and a large 'A' emblem, housing separate male and female dorms with a shared common space in the center.

NewEntityName.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair featuring pink highlights, wearing a black top, holding a clear plastic cup with a white lid and straw, speaking to the camera while walking along a paved path.

Hallway with Green Wainscoting.description: A long, well-lit indoor hallway with green wainscoting, wooden flooring, and white upper walls, featuring doors with decorative windows, bulletin boards with student work, and recessed ceiling lights, creating a clean and academic atmosphere.

Signature Wall.description: A white wall covered in handwritten names, messages, and drawings from residents since 2015, including a colorful 'ANANA' sign and a pineapple illustration, serving as a historical record of the dorm community.

raw_segments: The video opens with a sweeping panoramic view from an elevated walkway, showcasing a serene campus landscape with a calm water body, lush trees, and modern buildings under a clear blue sky, all set to an upbeat French pop song. The camera pans right, revealing a distinctive multi-story dormitory building with a geometric facade and a central atrium. A hand enters the frame, pointing to the building, which is identified by a text overlay as 'A4: IKHAYA - House of Pineapples,' with Chinese subtitles translating to 'The house I lived in for three years, IKHAYA.' The scene transitions inside to a hallway with purple wainscoting and wooden doors, then moves into a dorm room. Inside, a neatly arranged but lived-in space features a bed, desk, shelves, and personal items. A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair and pink highlights, wearing a black t-shirt and holding a phone, is reflected in a mirror. She speaks in Chinese, explaining that "This is my dorm room, it's a bit messy because I'm graduating and packing things." The camera pans to the window, revealing adjacent buildings and a circular architectural feature. Near the window, luggage, yoga mats, a foam roller, and a small heater are visible, which the woman identifies in Chinese as "my suitcases, yoga mat for exercise, foam roller, and the winter savior for northerners in the south, the electric heater," indicating preparation for departure. The hand reappears, pointing out the circular feature seen through the window, linking the interior view to the exterior architecture, all while the French pop song continues in the background.

event_blocks.summary: A hand points upward towards a modern multi-story building with a geometric facade as a soft French song plays, transitioning to a wide view of a grand, open lobby interior featuring polished stone flooring, large pillars, and a curved glass railing around a central atrium illuminated by a circular skylight with a wooden lattice. A Chinese speaker identifies the location as "Baijiatan" (百家谈), noting its connection to the teaching building and the second-floor dormitory platform where soda and coffee are purchased. The camera moves to reveal a circular glass-enclosed area with potted plants and a blue 'SU' sculpture adorned with flowers, then pans around the atrium, showcasing large circular stained-glass windows and expansive campus views including a body of water, greenery, and other modern campus buildings. The speaker mentions a fountain ("喷水池") on the first floor below the former theater, a football field ("足球场"), and a university across the river. A flagpole with a red flag is visible as the camera continues through the bright, naturally lit atrium space, highlighting its open-air design and integration of indoor and outdoor environments. Brief Chinese text appears, reading '在后面的彩蛋里' (In the bonus content later), as the serene, architecturally impressive scene, integrating nature and modern design, concludes with the French song still playing.

Skylight with Wooden Lattice.description: A large, circular skylight with a wooden lattice design, positioned above the atrium, providing ample natural light and contributing to the open, airy feel of the space.

Lobby Interior.description: A spacious, polished lobby with large pillars, reflective flooring, arched alcoves with potted plants, and glass doors leading to an outdoor area, now shown with a modern atrium design featuring glass railings and multi-level access, visible during the transition up the stairs and into the upper hallway.

Blue 'SU' Sculpture.description: A large, blue, three-dimensional 'SU' sculpture filled with colorful flowers, located at the base of the central atrium, serving as a decorative and symbolic centerpiece.

Atrium Space.description: An open, multi-level atrium with modern furniture, indoor plants climbing columns, and a mix of natural and artificial lighting, creating a bright and airy atmosphere, now clearly visible with glass railings on upper levels and a view of the campus courtyard.

Modern Campus Buildings.description: These multi-story buildings, seen beyond the atrium, are specifically identified by the Chinese speaker as including a 'teaching building' (教学楼), a 'dormitory building' (宿舍楼) with a second-floor platform, and a 'university across the river' (河对岸的大学).

Campus Courtyard.description: This outdoor area, visible from the atrium, is noted by the Chinese speaker to contain a 'fountain' (喷水池) on the first floor of a nearby building, and a 'football field' (足球场) is also mentioned as part of the campus.

Circular Stained-Glass Windows.description: Large, circular windows with intricate geometric patterns, embedded in the walls of the lobby, allowing natural light to filter through and adding artistic detail to the space.

raw_segments: The video opens with a close-up of a hand pointing upward toward a modern multi-story building with a geometric facade, accompanied by a soft French song playing in the background. The camera then transitions to a wide view of a grand, open lobby space with polished stone flooring, large pillars, and a curved glass railing surrounding a central atrium, illuminated by natural light streaming through a large, circular skylight with a wooden lattice design. A Chinese speaker begins to describe the location, identifying it as "Baijiatan" (百家谈), which connects to the teaching building and the second-floor platform of the dormitory building, where they usually buy soda and coffee. As the camera moves forward, it reveals a circular glass-enclosed area with potted plants and a decorative blue 'SU' sculpture filled with colorful flowers at its base. The speaker continues, pointing out the area below the former theater, and a fountain ("喷水池") on the first floor of the building, while the camera pans around the atrium, showcasing large circular stained-glass windows and expansive views of the campus beyond, including a body of water, greenery, and other buildings. The speaker also mentions a football field ("足球场") and a university across the river. A flagpole with a red flag is visible, and the camera continues to move through the bright, natural-lit space, capturing the open-air design and the connection between indoor and outdoor environments. Chinese text appears briefly on screen, reading '在后面的彩蛋里' (In the bonus content later), hinting at additional content, as the serene and architecturally impressive scene highlights the integration of nature and modern design within the campus environment, all while the French song continues.

event_blocks.summary: An elevated view from a walkway, framed by large circular stained-glass windows, overlooks a well-manicured campus courtyard with red flowers and a multi-story modern campus building under a clear blue sky, as an upbeat, melancholic French pop song begins to play. The camera descends, revealing a black metal railing and stairs, then transitions indoors to a spacious, polished lobby interior, identified as the main hall of a theater where the Norwegian royal family departed by car. Within a glass enclosure, a circular display of bronze zodiac head sculptures is arranged on black pedestals, with the camera panning around this display, showcasing modern design and framed artwork. The scene shifts to a white wall covered in colorful handprints, labeled 'CHANGSHU 2016', followed by a close-up of a large peace symbol and a world map, both filled with vibrant, childlike drawings and messages. A large peace hand gesture art, filled with words like 'peace', 'love', and 'amor' in multiple languages, including Chinese characters for '和平', with '2017' and 'CWSC' below, is then shown. A female voice speaks in Chinese, saying, "那么，我们今天的视频就到这里啦，再见，拜拜！" (So, that's it for today's video. Goodbye, bye-bye!), before the French pop music resumes. The final shot reveals a mural titled 'CLASS 2019', featuring a traditional Chinese gate flanked by red dragons, cultural symbols, and student artwork, signed by 'MARA TUNELA' and 'CLASS 2019 BAYK 120'. Concurrently, a female voice explains in Chinese, "这个就代表我们这一届2019届毕业生的..." (This represents our graduating class of 2019...), emphasizing the mural's significance.

Peace Symbol Mural.description: A large peace symbol and world map mural, filled with vibrant, childlike drawings and messages promoting global unity and environmental awareness.

Peace Hand Gesture Art.description: A large hand making a peace sign, filled with words for 'peace' in multiple languages, including Chinese '和平', with '2017' and 'CWSC' inscribed below, emphasizing international harmony.

Class 2019 Mural.description: A mural titled 'CLASS 2019' featuring a traditional Chinese gate flanked by red dragons, with cultural symbols and student artwork, signed by 'MARA TUNELA' and 'CLASS 2019 BAYK 120', which a female voice explains in Chinese represents the graduating class of 2019, celebrating student identity and heritage.

Lobby Interior.description: A spacious, polished lobby with large pillars, reflective flooring, arched alcoves with potted plants, and glass doors leading to an outdoor area, now shown with a modern atrium design featuring glass railings and multi-level access, visible during the transition up the stairs and into the upper hallway, and identified by Chinese subtitles as the main hall on the first floor of a theater where the Norwegian royal family departed by car.

Zodiac Head Sculptures.description: A circular display of bronze animal head sculptures, resembling the lost zodiac heads from the Old Summer Palace, mounted on black pedestals within a glass enclosure in the lobby, symbolizing cultural heritage.

Atrium Space.description: An open, multi-level atrium with modern furniture, indoor plants climbing columns, and a mix of natural and artificial lighting, creating a bright and airy atmosphere, now clearly visible with glass railings on upper levels and a view of the campus courtyard.

Handprint Wall Art.description: A white wall covered in colorful handprints, labeled 'CHANGSHU 2016', representing student participation and community spirit.

Modern Campus Buildings.description: Multi-story buildings with white walls and dark tiled roofs featuring traditional upturned eaves, situated around a landscaped courtyard and visible across a calm body of water, blending classical Chinese architecture with modern design elements.

Campus Courtyard.description: A central courtyard with white walls, decorative wall openings shaped like vases, stone benches, and a circular mosaic design on the ground, surrounded by traditional pavilions and greenery, under bright sunlight.

Circular Stained-Glass Windows.description: Large, circular windows with intricate geometric patterns, embedded in the walls of the lobby, allowing natural light to filter through and adding artistic detail to the space.

raw_segments: The video opens with an elevated view from a walkway, framed by large circular stained-glass windows, overlooking a well-manicured campus courtyard with red flowers and a multi-story building under a clear blue sky. As the camera slowly moves forward and descends, revealing a black metal railing and stairs, an upbeat, somewhat melancholic French pop song with a female vocalist begins to play, featuring lyrics about the difficulty of expressing feelings or fear of ruining things. The scene transitions indoors to a spacious, polished lobby, identified by Chinese subtitles as the main hall on the first floor of a theater where the Norwegian royal family departed by car. Here, a circular display of bronze animal head sculptures, reminiscent of the lost zodiac heads, is arranged on black pedestals within a glass enclosure. The camera pans around this display, showing modern design and framed artwork. The background music continues as the scene shifts to a white wall covered in colorful handprints, labeled 'CHANGSHU 2016', followed by a close-up of a large peace symbol and a world map, both filled with vibrant, childlike drawings and messages. A large peace sign hand gesture, filled with words like 'peace', 'love', and 'amor' in multiple languages, including Chinese characters for '和平', with '2017' and 'CWSC' below, is then shown. Briefly, a female voice speaks in Chinese, saying, "那么，我们今天的视频就到这里啦，再见，拜拜！" (So, that's it for today's video. Goodbye, bye-bye!), before the French pop music resumes. The final shot reveals a mural titled 'CLASS 2019', featuring a traditional Chinese gate flanked by red dragons, cultural symbols, and student artwork, signed by 'MARA TUNELA' and 'CLASS 2019 BAYK 120'. Concurrently, a female voice explains in Chinese, "这个就代表我们这一届2019届毕业生的..." (This represents our graduating class of 2019...), emphasizing the mural's significance. The overall atmosphere conveys cultural richness, student creativity, and global awareness, with a strong emphasis on peace and heritage.

event_blocks.summary: The video begins with a detailed close-up of the 'Class 2019 Mural', a vibrant artwork depicting a traditional Chinese gate with red dragons, rich with student-related icons and cultural references such as 'What is Nationalism?', 'Meat Free Mondays', 'WeChat Arguments', 'Bubble Tea Nights', 'Pelham Unified Roberts', Chinese characters '你好' and '方便', a rainbow flag, and a 'Student Government' emblem, as a female voice highlights the presence of WeChat, bubble tea, the principal, and numerous small details while the camera slowly pans across the intricate design. The scene then shifts to a dimly lit, empty underground parking garage characterized by exposed pipes and a single electric scooter, where the voice explains the location for picking up takeout through an opening in a wire mesh gate. A red scooter and then a car pass by through a large metal gate, accompanied by the sound of a passing vehicle, before the video concludes with a white 'Thank You Screen' displaying the Chinese text '谢谢你的观看!'.

Class 2019 Mural.description: A detailed mural titled 'CLASS 2019' featuring a traditional Chinese gate flanked by red dragons, filled with student-related icons, cultural symbols, and text such as 'What is Nationalism?', 'Meat Free Mondays', 'WeChat Arguments', 'Bubble Tea Nights', 'Pelham Unified Roberts', and Chinese characters like '你好' and '方便', signed by 'MARA TUNELA' and 'CLASS 2019 BAYK 120'. A female voice identifies specific elements like 'WeChat' and 'bubble tea' on the mural, points out a figure as 'our principal', and generally comments on the 'many, many small details' present.

Thank You Screen.description: A plain white screen with the Chinese text '谢谢你的观看!' (Thank you for watching!) in bold, 3D-style white characters with soft shadows, serving as the closing title card.

Underground Parking Garage.description: A dimly lit, empty parking garage with exposed ceiling pipes, polished concrete floors, and a single electric scooter parked near the entrance, with a large metal gate leading to an outdoor area where vehicles pass by. A female voice identifies this area as 'where we pick up takeout' and specifies that 'there's an opening on this wire mesh gate' for this purpose.

raw_segments: The video opens with a close-up of the vibrant 'Class 2019 Mural', a symbolic artwork featuring a traditional Chinese gate flanked by red dragons. A female voice notes, "And on top of this, there's WeChat, bubble tea," and points out, "This is our principal," adding that "There are many, many small details." The mural is indeed rich with student-related icons and cultural references like 'What is Nationalism?', 'Meat Free Mondays', 'WeChat Arguments', 'Bubble Tea Nights', 'Pelham Unified Roberts', Chinese characters '你好' and '方便', a rainbow flag, and a 'Student Government' emblem, all while the camera slowly pans across its intricate design. The scene then transitions to a dimly lit, empty underground parking garage with exposed pipes and a single electric scooter. The same voice explains, "And over there is where we pick up takeout," further detailing, "There's an opening on this wire mesh gate, you can pick up takeout from there." Through the large metal gate, a red scooter passes by, followed by a car driving past, accompanied by the distinct sound of a passing vehicle. The video concludes with a simple white screen displaying the Chinese text '谢谢你的观看!' (Thank you for watching!).

global_entity_library.United CAFÉ: A modern café with a white sign bearing the name 'United CAFÉ' in elegant script, featuring a glass display case filled with pastries, cakes, and beverages, and shelves stocked with snacks and drinks, visible in the initial food court area.
global_entity_library.Street Sign: A blue rectangular street sign with white text reading '昆承湖西路 88' and postal code '215500', mounted on a concrete wall.
global_entity_library.Claire: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair featuring pink highlights, wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic print, holding a smartphone and scanning a QR code. She is the narrator, speaking in a female Chinese voice, sharing personal observations about the campus and her high school experience.
global_entity_library.Lobby Interior: A spacious, polished lobby with large pillars, reflective flooring, arched alcoves with potted plants, and glass doors leading to an outdoor area, now shown with a modern atrium design featuring glass railings and multi-level access, visible during the transition up the stairs and into the upper hallway, and identified by Chinese subtitles as the main hall on the first floor of a theater where the Norwegian royal family departed by car.
global_entity_library.Athletic Field: A large outdoor sports complex featuring a red running track with white lane markings, a green artificial turf field with soccer goals, a sandpit for long jump, and a chain-link fence bordering the area, surrounded by modern buildings with flags and trees under a clear blue sky. The narrator identifies it as a 'soccer field' and explains that the numerous national flags along its perimeter represent the diverse nationalities of students and teachers from her high school.
global_entity_library.Sports Centre: A sign on a concrete wall reading 'Sports Centre' in English and '体育中心' in Chinese, indicating the building's function as a fitness and recreational facility. A female voice confirms the destination, stating the center has three floors, with the first floor being a currently closed swimming pool and the second floor being her usual destination.
global_entity_library.Examination Sign: A white sign on a glass door reading 'Examination in Progress' and '考试进行中请保持安静' (Examination in Progress, Please Keep Quiet), indicating a quiet academic zone within the building, visible briefly in the hallway before entering the library space.
global_entity_library.Fitness Gym Area: A spacious indoor gym with red-accented walls, various weight machines, free weights, and treadmills, located on the lower level of the building, under bright, even lighting, identified by the speaker as the 'strength room' containing equipment, a large rack, and a 'boxing sandbag,' with a note that two of an original three items (possibly racks) have been removed.
global_entity_library.Water Dispenser: A stainless steel water dispenser located in a hallway, with a blue instructional sign nearby, suggesting a utility area for building occupants.

global_entity_library.Calligraphy Artwork: Framed vertical calligraphy pieces in black ink on white paper, mounted on the walls of the hallway, adding a cultural and artistic element to the space.
global_entity_library.Decorative Door with Chinese Window: A wooden door with a traditional Chinese-style arched window, adorned with red decorative paper featuring the '福' (fortune) character, a blue '拉' (pull) sign, and a police contact notice, is seen as soft, melodic traditional Chinese music plays, featuring a female voice singing in Mandarin, '老师在教室里' (The teacher is in the classroom), suggesting a culturally decorated classroom or educational space.

global_entity_library.Zodiac Head Sculptures: A circular display of bronze animal head sculptures, resembling the lost zodiac heads from the Old Summer Palace, mounted on black pedestals within a glass enclosure in the lobby, symbolizing cultural heritage.
global_entity_library.Handprint Wall Art: A white wall covered in colorful handprints, labeled 'CHANGSHU 2016', representing student participation and community spirit.
global_entity_library.Thank You Screen: A plain white screen with the Chinese text '谢谢你的观看!' (Thank you for watching!) in bold, 3D-style white characters with soft shadows, serving as the closing title card.
global_entity_library.Underground Parking Garage: A dimly lit, empty parking garage with exposed ceiling pipes, polished concrete floors, and a single electric scooter parked near the entrance, with a large metal gate leading to an outdoor area where vehicles pass by. A female voice identifies this area as 'where we pick up takeout' and specifies that 'there's an opening on this wire mesh gate' for this purpose.
